concerns.text: Task T026 ('Validate algorithm implementation for CORE invariants') contradicts spec.md FR-003/SC-008 which state core invariants (crossing number, braid index) are TABULATED, not computed. Algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants (Phase 2+). This task describes a capability that does not exist per spec.
Success Criterion SC-007 requires a validation script to automate tie-breaking rule consistency checks. Task T030 only documents rules. No task exists to implement the required validation script.

Tasks T009 (Foundational) and T043 (US4) both implement 'missing_invariant_flags' in code/data/validator.py per FR-009. This duplication risks implementation conflict and suggests unclear task boundaries.
Task T002 specifies pyproject.toml, but plan.md Project Structure section specifies requirements.txt. Constitution permits either, but plan should be the source of truth for implementation structure.
